text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whew... I worked really hard in training today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! As a reward, I'll watch some of the sumo
matches I recorded. ♪ I wonder what kind of
winning techniques—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You can't be serious! That was the grand
champion's final match before retirement, too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her failure to record an extremely important
sumo match leaves Sakura Chiyono O deeply
depressed...
